name: Savior Angel
description:
When the earth had reached real destruction, people began to despair with life that seemed hopeless for their future on earth.

Their prayers all this time were finally answered with the descent of an angel. His power can help humans and give hopes for their future.

However, human nature is cunning, they actually lock him up and use the power of the angel and sabotage it. Some groups of people do not agree with such a cruel thing.

The angel was locked in a tower with tight security, and there were many workers in it. In the laboratory, there was a lot of rottenness that was hidden from society, such as the failure of experiments from innocent people.
